description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow set within a walled property featuring a landscaped garden, a tennis court, and multiple outdoor seating areas. The main building has a flat roof with geometric patterns, large glass windows, and a mix of white and gray exterior finishes. The front of the house includes a driveway with parked cars, a small porch, and decorative plants. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, lounge furniture, and a spacious patio for outdoor gatherings. The tennis court is located to one side of the property, surrounded by greenery and palm trees. The overall design emphasizes open space, clean lines, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, a tennis court, and a swimming pool within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, porch, decorative plants, and part of the tennis court and garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, swimming pool, patio area, and the full length of the tennis court.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tennis court, backyard lounge area, and the back facade with large windows and patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, parked cars, garden, and the tennis court from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
